title: Astro Starter Kits
goal: Build two production-quality Astro starter kits (docs + portfolio/marketing) with cohesive protoLabs brand identity, designed for AI agent customization via Content Collections and JSON config. These become the onboarding experience for create-protolab.

milestones.title: Shared Design System
milestones.description: Extract protoLabs brand tokens into a shared Tailwind config and component library that both starter kits consume.

phases.name: create-shared-tailwind-brand-preset
phases.title: Create shared Tailwind brand preset
phases.description: Extract brand design tokens from site/index.html into a reusable Tailwind v4 CSS preset. Includes: surface colors, accent violet, gradient definitions, Geist font families, glow effects, border opacity tokens, badge styles, and semantic colors.
acceptanceCriteria: Tailwind v4 CSS with all brand tokens as CSS custom properties

phases.name: create-shared-astro-component-library
phases.title: Create shared Astro component library
phases.description: Build reusable Astro components: Nav (sticky header with React mobile menu island), Footer (links, social, copyright), SEO (meta tags from props), Button (primary/secondary/ghost), Badge (color variants), Card (surface-2 bg with hover glow).
acceptanceCriteria: Nav with sticky positioning and gradient logo text
Footer with configurable links and social icons
SEO component for all meta tags
Button Badge Card components with brand tokens

milestones.title: Docs Starter Kit (Starlight)
milestones.description: Complete Astro Starlight documentation site with protoLabs custom theme.

phases.name: scaffold-starlight-project-with-protolabs-theme
phases.title: Scaffold Starlight project with protoLabs theme
phases.description: Create Astro Starlight docs site at libs/templates/starters/docs/. Custom theme: brand colors, Geist fonts, violet accent sidebar, gradient logo, dark-first. Content Collections for docs. Sample Diataxis content.
acceptanceCriteria: Working Starlight site with npm run dev
Custom theme with brand colors and Geist fonts
Sample content: tutorial, how-to guide, reference page

phases.name: add-docs-kit-ci-and-agent-context
phases.title: Add docs kit CI and agent context
phases.description: Add CI workflow, .automaker/ context files, and wire into libs/templates/ StarterKitType system.
acceptanceCriteria: CI with build, format, lint, deploy steps
Agent context file explains Starlight structure

milestones.title: Portfolio Starter Kit
milestones.description: Custom Astro SSG + React Islands portfolio/marketing site. The flagship onboarding experience.

phases.name: scaffold-portfolio-project-structure
phases.title: Scaffold portfolio project structure
phases.description: Create Astro project at libs/templates/starters/portfolio/. Configure Astro 5.x, @astrojs/react, Tailwind v4, View Transitions, Content Collections. Zod schemas for projects, blog, testimonials, site config. Seed content.
acceptanceCriteria: Working Astro project with npm run dev

phases.name: build-portfolio-page-sections
phases.title: Build portfolio page sections
phases.description: Hero (gradient text, terminal mockup, CTAs), ProjectGrid (filterable React island), About (skills, timeline), Testimonials, Contact (React island form), BlogList. All composable on index.astro.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero with gradient text and terminal mockup
ProjectGrid with tag filtering React island
Contact form React island with validation

phases.name: build-portfolio-sub-pages-and-seo
phases.title: Build portfolio sub-pages and SEO
phases.description: Sub-pages: /projects, /projects/[slug], /blog, /blog/[slug], /about, /contact. SEO meta on all pages. Sitemap, RSS feed. Lighthouse 95+.
acceptanceCriteria: All sub-pages with content from Collections
SEO meta tags on every page

phases.name: add-portfolio-kit-ci-and-agent-context
phases.title: Add portfolio kit CI and agent context
phases.description: CI workflow, .automaker/ context, wire into libs/templates/. Add 'portfolio' to StarterKitType. Create starter features, coding rules, CLAUDE.md fragment.

milestones.title: Integration and Polish
milestones.description: Wire into create-protolab, verify end-to-end, and polish visuals.

phases.name: wire-starter-kits-into-create-protolab-scaffold-flow
phases.title: Wire starter kits into create-protolab scaffold flow
phases.description: Update scaffolding so docs/portfolio types copy the Astro project with name/config substitution. Verify full flow: select type, scaffold, install, dev server.
acceptanceCriteria: create-protolab offers docs and portfolio options

phases.name: visual-polish-and-responsive-qa
phases.title: Visual polish and responsive QA
phases.description: Final visual pass on both kits. Brand consistency with landing page. Responsive testing. Animation polish. Dark mode QA.
acceptanceCriteria: Both kits match protoLabs landing page aesthetic

prd.situation: protoLabs Studio has a template system (libs/templates/) that provides metadata — starter features, coding rules, CLAUDE.md fragments, CI workflows — for three kit types: docs, extension, general. However, no actual project scaffolds exist. Users selecting 'docs' or a future 'portfolio' type get board features but no working Astro codebase. The landing page (site/) establishes a strong visual identity (Geist fonts, violet accent palette, dark surfaces, subtle glows) but this isn't packaged as a reusable design system.
prd.problem: New users have no immediate 'wow moment'. There's no deployable project they can see live in 5 minutes. The onboarding flow generates board features but no code. Competitors (v0, Bolt, Lovable) deliver visual results instantly. protoLabs needs starter kits that give users a working site immediately, are structured for AI agent modification, and represent the protoLabs brand cohesively.
prd.approach: Build two Astro starter kits sharing a common design system derived from the protoLabs landing page. Both use Astro SSG + React Islands architecture with Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui for interactive components, and Content Collections for AI-writeable content. Kit 1 (docs): Astro Starlight with custom protoLabs theme. Kit 2 (portfolio): Custom Astro site with Hero, Projects, Blog, About, Contact sections. Both deploy to Cloudflare Pages. Wire into libs/templates/ as scaffold-able project types for create-protolab.
prd.results: Two deployable starter kits with: Lighthouse scores 95+ across all metrics, Content Collections with Zod schemas for type-safe AI content generation, protoLabs brand identity (Geist fonts, violet palette, dark-first, gradient text), Pre-configured .automaker/context/ files teaching agents the codebase, CI workflows for GitHub Actions, One-command deploy to Cloudflare Pages, Integration with libs/templates/ StarterKitType system.
prd.constraints: Astro 5.x stable. Tailwind CSS 4 via @tailwindcss/vite plugin. shadcn/ui for interactive React islands only. Content Collections with Zod schemas. Zero JS by default. View Transitions for SPA-like nav. Brand tokens from site/index.html. Dark-first design. No emojis.
